source.title: 2025 618 百亿补贴 platform comparison: PDD vs Taobao vs JD reliability

extractions.claim: Price hierarchy across China's Big 3 platforms: Pinduoduo百亿补贴 generally lowest, Taobao百亿补贴 middle, JD百亿补贴 highest but best after-sales. PDD top-10 bestsellers 30-40% lower than Taobao, 50-60% lower than Douyin.
extractions.evidence: Zhihu analysis (2025): PDD百亿补贴 price usually lowest, most products cheaper than JD/Taobao百亿补贴 or at parity with Taobao. Taobao百亿补贴 is 'most moderate' — digital 3C higher than JD, other goods higher than PDD. JD百亿补贴 not cheapest but best after-sales service. Leaked PDD internal comparison: top-10 hot items 30-40% below Taobao, 50-60% below Douyin.

verification.verifier_notes: Zhihu user analysis corroborated by 36kr百亿补贴 comparison article and multiple industry reports

extractions.claim: Shipping speed trade-off: PDD 3-7 days, Taobao 3 days, JD next-day delivery. Consumers pay for JD's premium with higher prices but get faster logistics.
extractions.evidence: PDD ships within 7, 5, or 3 days depending on merchant; Taobao百亿补贴 within 3 days; JD next-day delivery standard. JD's self-operated warehousing model drives higher costs but faster fulfillment.

verification.verifier_notes: Consistent across Zhihu analysis and platform comparison articles

extractions.claim: Average order value reflects platform positioning: PDD ~30-50 RMB, Taobao ~100-150 RMB, Tmall ~200+ RMB, JD ~400+ RMB. PDD AOV was 40 RMB in 2021 (latest disclosed figure).
extractions.evidence: Statista: PDD AOV 40 RMB in 2021, down from 44 RMB in 2020. Historical benchmarks: Tmall 214 RMB (Double 11 2018), JD 422 RMB. Platforms do not publicly disclose current AOV. PDD's low AOV reflects focus on daily essentials and high-frequency low-value purchases.

verification.verifier_notes: Statista data for PDD AOV 2021; JD/Tmall figures from older benchmarks. Current AOV not publicly disclosed by any platform.
